breakdown: The PR adds a poorly-scoped helper function with good naming conventions and solid schema loading architecture, but the diff shows only ~40 lines of a larger file with no visible test coverage or full implementation of the rewards helper. Error handling uses appropriate custom exceptions and circuit breaker patterns, though some generic Exception catches exist.
reasoning: Cannot fully assess test coverage as no test files are visible in the diff. The naming and architecture dimensions score moderately well (descriptive function names, custom exception classes, circuit breaker pattern), but type safety is limited by incomplete type annotations on some public APIs and use of `Any`. Documentation exists on public functions but lacks explanatory comments for complex patterns like the cooldown timing value.
